title: Layer VQE: Structured Variational Ansatz Design
description: Learn how Layer VQE organizes variational circuits into structured layers, enabling systematic depth control and improved optimization landscapes for quantum chemistry applications.
learningObjectives: Understand the layer-based approach to VQE ansatz construction
Implement layer growth strategies for systematic accuracy improvement
Analyze the trade-off between circuit depth and expressibility
Compare Layer VQE with ADAPT-VQE and UCCSD approaches
Apply Layer VQE to molecular ground state problems
